title: Kinematic Lorentz invariance (inertia) under H-SUPPRESSION
statement: Kinematic Lorentz invariance holds as a conditional theorem under the explicit (H-SUPPRESSION) hypothesis (legacy PC-3C form).
scope: Conditional theorem; the hypothesis is load-bearing and separately gated.
falsifier: A counterexample to the IR bound within the theorem's stated class, or demonstration that H-SUPPRESSION fails in the TECT background.
next_action: H-SUPPRESSION discharge: full TECT-Hessian + Wetterich projection + negative-eigenvalue derivation.
